mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, supporting higher valuations and generating positive forward returns in the absence of inflationary shocks.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in low-rate periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Elevated unemployment rates signal weak labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending power, leading to negative equity returns when the unemployment rate exceeds the 8.0% threshold.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or the signal loses predictive power when unemployment is falling.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation (CPIAUCSL) rises while the federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) remains pinned near zero, negative real interest rates emerge, driving capital into risk assets and generating positive returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a single-series baseline, or positive returns do not materialize when real rates are negative.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts (HOUST) act as a leading indicator of economic recovery; in a post-shock recovery regime, this signals expanding credit and construction activity, driving positive returns.
failure_condition: The signal predicts positive returns during recessionary periods, or the correlation between housing starts and equity returns becomes negative.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in industrial production (INDPRO) indicates a contraction in the supply sector, signaling immediate economic weakness and triggering negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 55% of triggered instances, or the signal shows no predictive power over short horizons.

mechanism_narrative: Higher retail sales (RSAFS) reflect robust consumer demand, which constitutes the largest component of GDP growth, directly supporting corporate earnings and positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or retail sales growth fails to predict equity direction.

mechanism_narrative: Strong non-farm payroll growth (PAYEMS) exceeding 150,000 jobs per month signals a strengthening labor market and improved economic momentum, predicting positive equity returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances, or the threshold proves arbitrary with no statistical edge.

mechanism_narrative: Positive quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP (GDPC1) confirms macroeconomic expansion, providing a fundamental basis for sustained positive equity performance over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: GDP growth fails to predict 60-day forward returns, or the signal is subsumed by other higher-frequency indicators.
